title: Massacre on Ruusan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Ruusan}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Conflicting|[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]|[[Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith]]}} {{Battle |prev= |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Ruusan.jpg]] |name=Massacre on Ruusan |conflict=[[New Sith Wars]] ([[Ruusan campaign]]) |date=c. [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] |place=[[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] |result=Jedi victory, Sith tactical retreat |side1=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]
([[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]]) |side2=[[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Kiel Charny]] † *[[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]] |commanders2=*[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan]] *[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] *[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Githany]] *Lord [[Kopecz]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] *[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] *[[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] *Republic Troops |forces2=*27 [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] *Sith Acolytes and Cultists *[[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] *[[Swoop/Legends|Swoops]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Heavy, including: *[[Kiel Charny]] *[[Pernicar]] *[[Rajan]] *[[Turpimir]] |casual2=Light |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Are you ready to kill a world?|[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] to the [[Sith Council]]|''[[Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith]]''}} The '''Massacre on Ruusan''' was a battle of the [[New Sith Wars]]. The [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] sent their minions on a diversionary attack on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] forces of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Kiel Charny]] while the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords]] themselves assembled in a meditation circle far away from the battlefield. [[File:ThoughtBomb-JvS4.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The effects of the Force wave created by the Sith lords.]] There, under the guidance of the recently returned [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]], the Sith joined together to create a wave of Force-powered devastation that decimated the ranks of the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] and scoured the surface of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. But before they achieved total victory, [[Skere Kaan]] broke from the meditation circle, leading his fellow Lords in a more conventional [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]]-based aerial assault on the broken ranks of the Jedi. Although Bane exhorted the departing Sith to reform the circle and complete their task, [[Kopecz]] warned him that Kaan and the other Lords had broken away out of fear of Bane's power and ambition that they had sensed through the link. In the meantime, 300 [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] under [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]] had arrived from their confrontation with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Lahzar]], fighting through the Sith blockade over Ruusan, arriving just in time to help stave off Kaan's advances. In the ensuing confusion after the battle, the young [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Darovit]] defected to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], but not before killing the heavily wounded and incapacitated Kiel Charny. ==Behind the scenes== Chapter twenty-six of ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' established that the six major battles of the [[Ruusan campaign]] had already concluded prior to Bane arriving on Ruusan, therefore this battle can not currently be classified as one of the seven battles of Ruusan.''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]] {{1st}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NewSithWarsNav}} {{Interlang |pt=Sexta Batalha de Ruusan |es=Masacre en Ruusan |pl=Szósta bitwa o Ruusan }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ruusan, massacre on}} [[Category:Battles of the Ruusan campaign]] [[Category:Genocides and massacres]]
